zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Grosvenor於1507年出生在英國英格蘭爾時，他的父親Sir Richard Herbert Grosvenor, Esq30歲，母親Katherine Cotton34歲。他與Lady Katherine Dutton在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是7個女兒的父母。他去世於1542年8月6日在英國爾享年35歲，埋葬在英國爾艾克斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Grosvenor于1507年出生在英国英格兰爾时，他的父亲Sir Richard Herbert Grosvenor, Esq30岁，母亲Katherine Cotton34岁。他与Lady Katherine Dutton在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是7个女儿的父母。他去世于1542年8月6日在英国爾享年35岁，埋葬在英国爾艾克斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Grosvenor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from French gros ‘big, great’ + veneur ‘hunter’.

History: This is the name of one of the wealthiest families in Britain, which holds the title Duke of Westminster. They have been long established in Cheshire, with strong links with the city of Chester. One of the earliest recorded bearers of the name was Robert le Grosvenor of Budworth, who was granted lands by the Earl of Chester in 1160. The family's fortunes were founded by Thomas Grosvenor (born 1656), who in 1677 married an heiress, Mary Davies, whose inheritance included Ebury Farm, Middlesex. This now forms an area of central London that includes Grosvenor Square and Belgrave Square.

variants.name: Gravenor
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French grand ‘big, tall’ + veneor ‘hunter’. Compare Grosvenor .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Grosvenor was born in 1507, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Richard Herbert Grosvenor, Esq, was 30 and his mother, Katherine Cotton, was 34. He married Lady Katherine Dutton in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 daughters. He died on 6 August 1542, in Cheshire, England, at the age of 35, and was buried in Eccleston, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Grosvenor est né en 1507, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Herbert Grosvenor, Esq, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Katherine Cotton, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Lady Katherine Dutton à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 filles. Il est décédé le 6 août 1542, à Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterré à Eccleston, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Grosvenor 1507 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Herbert Grosvenor, Esq 30 und seine Mutter Katherine Cotton 34. Er hat in England, United Kingdom Lady Katherine Dutton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Töchter. Er starb am 6. August 1542 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Cheshire, England und wurde in Eccleston, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Grosvenor è nato il nel 1507 nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Richard Herbert Grosvenor, Esq, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Cotton, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Lady Katherine Dutton nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figlie. Morì il 6 agosto 1542, nel Cheshire, England, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolto a Eccleston, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Grosvenorが1507年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Herbert Grosvenor, Esqは30歳，母Katherine Cottonは34歳であった。イギリスイギリスでLady Katherine Duttonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の娘の親であった。彼は1542年8月6日にイギリスチェシュアイアで35歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアエククレストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Grosvenor(이)가 1507년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Herbert Grosvenor, Esq(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Cotton(은)는 34세였다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드에서 Lady Katherine Dutton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1542년 8월 6일 영국 체실르에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 c클스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Grosvenor nasceu em 1507, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Richard Herbert Grosvenor, Esq, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Cotton, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Katherine Dutton em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de agosto de 1542, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 35 anos, e foi sepultado em Eccleston, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Grosvenor родился в 1507 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Herbert Grosvenor, Esq было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Cotton, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Katherine Dutton в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 дочерей. Он умер 6 августа 1542 г. в местности чешир, Англия в возрасте 35 лет и был похоронен в местности экклестон, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Grosvenor nació en 1507, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Richard Herbert Grosvenor, Esq, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Katherine Cotton, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Lady Katherine Dutton en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijas. Murió el 6 de agosto de 1542, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultado en Eccleston, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
